# Read the file content
path = '/mnt/data/file-B3qHTrJ4jEjJpSorTiMofg-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

import re

text = open('/mnt/data/file-B3qHTrJ4jEjJpSorTiMofg-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()

spans = []

# Helper to add span dict
def add_span(start, end, citation_type, label):
    span_text = text[start:end]
    spans.append({
        'span_start': start,
        'span_end': end,
        'span_text': span_text,
        'citation_type': citation_type,
        'label': label
    })

# 1) Extract between (aya_start)...(aya_end)
for m in re.finditer(r'\(aya_start\)', text):
    start_idx = m.end()
    end_marker = text.find('(aya_end)', start_idx)
    if end_marker != -1:
        # Trim whitespace at edges (though likely none)
        inner = text[start_idx:end_marker]
        # Determine trimmed edges excluding whitespace
        lstrip = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
        rstrip = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
        start = start_idx + lstrip
        end = end_marker - rstrip
        add_span(start, end, 'Aya', 'aya_marker')
        
# 2) Between (hadith_start)...(hadith_end)
for m in re.finditer(r'\(hadith_start\)', text):
    start_idx = m.end()
    end_marker = text.find('(hadith_end)', start_idx)
    if end_marker != -1:
        inner = text[start_idx:end_marker]
        lstrip = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
        rstrip = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
        start = start_idx + lstrip
        end = end_marker - rstrip
        add_span(start, end, 'Hadith', 'hadith_marker')

# 3) Double parentheses content ((...))
for m in re.finditer(r'\(\((.*?)\)\)', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    # Determine start and end in original text excluding the (( and ))
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    # Trim whitespace at edges and Arabic punctuation spaces
    trimmed_inner = inner.strip()
    # compute adjustments
    ltrim = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    rtrim = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    # Some inner have trailing/leading spaces; also sometimes spaces before question mark, we keep punctuation inside if part of quote.
    add_span(start + ltrim, end - rtrim, 'Hadith', 'double_paren')

# 4) Quran ayah inside parentheses in [4]: starts with (
for m in re.finditer(r'\(فَقَالَ رَبِّ[^)]*\)', text):
    # inner = ... excluding parentheses
    start = m.start() + 1
    end = m.end() - 1
    # Trim whitespace
    inner = text[start:end]
    ltrim = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    rtrim = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    add_span(start + ltrim, end - rtrim, 'Aya', 'quran_paren')
    
# 5) Hadith direct speech after "فيقولون له:" up to "فيعتذر"
m = re.search(r'فيقولون له:\s*', text)
if m:
    start = m.end()
    # find "فيعتذر" after
    m2 = re.search(r'فيعتذر', text[start:])
    if m2:
        end = start + m2.start()
        # Trim trailing spaces and punctuation
        inner = text[start:end]
        # remove trailing spaces
        inner_stripped = inner.rstrip(' ؛،.')
        # compute new end
        end = start + len(inner_stripped)
        # Also trim leading spaces
        ltrim = len(inner_stripped) - len(inner_stripped.lstrip())
        start += ltrim
        add_span(start, end, 'Hadith', 'fiyaquluna')
        
# 6) Paraphrase after "ثبت في حديث الشفاعة أن" up to comma "،"
m = re.search(r'ثبت في حديث الشفاعة أن', text)
if m:
    start = m.end()
    # find comma
    comma_idx = text.find('،', start)
    # if found
    if comma_idx != -1:
        # Trim whitespace
        inner = text[start:comma_idx]
        inner_stripped = inner.strip()
        # compute new indices
        ltrim = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
        rtrim = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
        start_idx = start + ltrim
        end_idx = comma_idx - rtrim
        add_span(start_idx, end_idx, 'Hadith', 'paraphrase_hadith')

# Sort spans by start
spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x['span_start'])

len(spans_sorted), spans_sorted[:5]

for s in spans_sorted:
    print(s['label'], s['citation_type'], s['span_start'], s['span_end'], '|', s['span_text'])

# Build final citations list with required fields and schema citation_type "Hadeeth" instead of 'Hadith'
final_citations = []
for s in spans_sorted:
    citation_type = 'Aya' if s['citation_type'] == 'Aya' else 'Hadeeth'
    final_citations.append({
        'span_start': s['span_start'],
        'span_end': s['span_end'],
        'span_text': s['span_text'],
        'citation_type': citation_type
    })
final_citations

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":239,"span_end":385,"span_text":"وَلَمَّا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ وَاسْتَوَىٰ أَتْلُجَ الْبَيْتَ حِينَ بَلَغَ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبَّكُمْ ۖ إِنَّنِي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقْتُلُونِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":594,"span_end":667,"span_text":"أَنْتَ آدَمُ الَّذِي أَغْوَيْتَ النَّاسَ وَأَخْرَجْتَهُمْ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":988,"span_end":1026,"span_text":"وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1657,"span_end":1700,"span_text":"أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1725,"span_end":1815,"span_text":"أنت آدم أبو البشر، خلقك الله بيده، وأسجد لك ملائكته، ثم تخرج الناس من الجنة تأكل من الشجرة","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2025,"span_end":2130,"span_text":"قال له موسى أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟ فقال له آدم: أنت موسى الذي أعطاه الله علم كل شيء؟","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2150,"span_end":2180,"span_text":"أنت موسى الذي أعطاه علم كل شيء","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2204,"span_end":2270,"span_text":"أن الخضر قال له: ما علمي وما علمك إلى كما نقص هذا العصفور من البحر","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2893,"span_end":2964,"span_text":"الناس يأتون إلى آدم يطلبون منه الشفاعة فيعتذر بأكله من الشجرة وهو معصية","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":3228,"span_end":3277,"span_text":"أنت أول رسول بعثه الله إلى الأرض اشفع لنا عند ربك","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":3331,"span_end":3428,"span_text":"فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ ابْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِي وَإِنَّ وَعْدَكَ الْحَقُّ وَأَنْتَ أَحْكَمُ الْحَاكِمِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
